     the Fermi energy is    -0.3004 ev

!    total energy              =  -10339.99074500 Ry
     estimated scf accuracy    <          1.9E-09 Ry
     smearing contrib. (-TS)   =      -0.14941138 Ry
     internal energy E=F+TS    =  -10339.84133362 Ry

     The total energy is F=E-TS. E is the sum of the following terms:
     one-electron contribution = -220212.07349458 Ry
     hartree contribution      =  111136.18896050 Ry
     xc contribution           =   -4254.83962246 Ry
     ewald contribution        =  102992.86397578 Ry
     DFT-D3 Dispersion         =      -1.98115286 Ry

     total magnetization       =    90.11 Bohr mag/cell
     absolute magnetization    =    96.30 Bohr mag/cell

     convergence has been achieved in  30 iterations
